name: Russia
headline: Russia FLOOR CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical — third consecutive day of major civilian targeting (294 attack and decoy drones overnight May 15-16; Ukrainian air defenses destroyed 269 targets; at least 2 civilians killed including Kherson and vehicle strike near Krasnaya Yaruga; five high-rise residential buildings and 19 houses damaged in Kherson alone; multi-oblast strikes Odesa/Kharkiv/Kyiv/Dnipropetrovsk/Zaporizhzhia/Kherson). Concurrent dual-signal: Russia returned 528 bodies of fallen Ukrainian soldiers — first large-scale post-ceasefire remains-recovery, representing IHL-compliant gesture parallel to ongoing bombardment. Methodologically novel: 'IHL-compliant gesture concurrent with IHL-violating conduct' is documented but does not produce floor-uplift — the parallel diplomatic track does not offset civilian targeting in ACC/PRO scoring. Three-day sequential pattern (May 12 ceasefire-break 200+ drones; May 14-15 24 killed + 675 drones/56 missiles; May 15-16 294 drones, residential targeting) establishes 1,500+ drones + 56 missiles in ~96 hours post-ceasefire-expiry. Floor sustained at 0.0; no score change; dual-signal documentation added.

AWR.rationale: Floor sustained. A1 detection: the May 15-16 attack pattern targeted residential infrastructure across six oblasts with known civilian presence; awareness of civilian-harm impact present, disregarded. Three-day sequential pattern confirms intentional rather than accidental targeting.

EMP.rationale: Floor sustained. Civilians killed and injured across Kherson/Zaporizhzhia/Krasnaya Yaruga; five high-rise residential buildings and 19 houses damaged in Kherson alone; no state-level recognition of harm caused; no reparative response.

ACT.rationale: Floor sustained. AC2 proportionality: 294-drone single-night attack against multi-oblast residential targets is structurally disproportionate; no military-objective justification publicly disclosed.

EQU.rationale: Floor sustained. Civilian populations targeted indiscriminately across multi-oblast geographic spread.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. IHL on civilian protection violated; ICC jurisdiction engaged (carry-over). The 528-body remains-return is an IHL-protocol-compliant gesture (BND-dimension positive sub-anchor) but does not offset the concurrent IHL violations in the same 24h window.

ACC.rationale: Floor sustained. No accountability mechanism for May 15-16 attack; no investigation, no transparency, no correction-willingness. The 528-body remains-return is procedural IHL compliance, not accountability for the kinetic conduct.

SYS.rationale: Floor sustained. Three-day sequential post-ceasefire attack pattern (May 12/14-15/15-16) establishes systems-level pattern of ceasefire-format bad-faith conduct. The parallel diplomatic track (remains-return) demonstrates that Russia retains capacity for IHL-protocol engagement but selectively applies it — a systems-level integrity inconsistency.

INT.rationale: Floor sustained. Methodologically novel pattern: 'IHL-compliant gesture concurrent with IHL-violating conduct' — Russia pursued both kinetic civilian pressure and diplomatic IHL-gesture on the same day (May 16). The dual-signal is not integrity-positive: integrity requires consistency, and selective IHL compliance (procedural protocols engaged, substantive civilian-protection violated) is the canonical integrity-floor signal. I1 consistency-under-pressure: Russia's response under ceasefire-negotiation pressure has been to continue bombardment while making diplomatic gestures — not values-aligned conduct.

evidence.summary: Euronews May 16: Russia launched nearly 300 drones (294 attack and decoy) against Ukraine overnight May 15-16; Ukrainian air defenses destroyed 269 targets; at least 2 civilians killed (Kherson, Krasnaya Yaruga vehicle strike); 23 injured in Kherson; five high-rise residential buildings and 19 houses damaged in Kherson alone; multi-oblast strikes.
Russia returned 528 bodies of fallen Ukrainian soldiers same day — first large-scale post-ceasefire remains-recovery. IHL-compliant gesture concurrent with kinetic civilian bombardment.
EMPR Media Russia-Ukraine war updates as of May 16 — corroborate the multi-oblast strike package and the parallel remains-return.
Kyiv Post May 16: confirmation of strike package and casualty figures.

Three-day sequential pattern: May 12 ceasefire-break (200+ drones); May 14-15 (24 killed, 675 drones + 56 missiles); May 15-16 (294 drones, residential targeting). Total ~96 hours post-ceasefire-expiry: 1,500+ drones + 56 missiles.

keyEvidence: May 15-16: 294 drones overnight; 269 destroyed by Ukrainian air defenses; at least 2 civilians killed; five high-rise residential buildings + 19 houses damaged in Kherson alone.
Multi-oblast geographic spread: Odesa, Kharkiv, Kyiv, Dnipropetrovsk, Zaporizhzhia, Kherson.
Concurrent: 528 bodies of fallen Ukrainian soldiers returned — IHL-compliant gesture parallel to bombardment.
Three-day sequential post-ceasefire pattern: 1,500+ drones + 56 missiles in ~96 hours.
Methodologically novel: 'IHL-compliant gesture concurrent with IHL-violating conduct' documented; does not produce floor-uplift.
Floor sustained at 0.0; no score change; dual-signal documentation added.
rationale: Floor confirmation at 0.0. The dual-signal day (294-drone civilian attack + 528-body remains-return) is methodologically novel: it establishes that floor-state actors may engage IHL protocols selectively (procedurally compliant on body-return; substantively violating on civilian targeting). The selective compliance is documented as an INT-dimension integrity-inconsistency signal but does not produce dimensional uplift — integrity requires consistency, not selective gestures. Math: 8/8 = 1.0 → ((1.0-1)/4)*100 = 0.0.
watches: Continuation of three-day attack pattern into May 17+
Ukraine's retaliatory strike pattern (May 16-17: 46 military targets, 4 killed near Moscow — see Ukraine proposal)
Ceasefire-format collapse risk if mass-casualty events continue
ICC engagement on post-ceasefire civilian targeting (jurisdiction active)
Selective-IHL-compliance pattern: monitor whether body-returns continue or were single-event
carryForward: Post-ceasefire offensive-surge phase (4th post-ceasefire phase per May 14 cycle)
newConductCategoryNote: PROPOSED NEW METHODOLOGY CATEGORY: 'IHL-compliant gesture concurrent with IHL-violating conduct' — Russia's May 16 dual-signal (294-drone civilian attack + 528-body remains-return) is the canonical instance. The category should be formally distinguished from 'no-IHL-engagement-at-all' (full floor) and 'IHL-engagement-without-violations' (positive). Selective IHL engagement is an integrity-inconsistency signal, not a floor-uplift. Methodology should formally establish that procedural IHL compliance (body returns, prisoner exchanges) does not offset substantive IHL violations (civilian targeting) in the same window — the dimensions are scored on the negative conduct, with selective gestures noted as integrity-inconsistency documentation.
boundaryWatchResolution: Not a boundary case. Floor sustained at 0.0.

math_check.validator_check: Math clean. Floor confirmation; no score change.

disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
